summary: Completed frontend testing for 3 bug fixes/features: 1) Add Course button navigation, 2) Admin Admission Preview modal, 3) Bulk Quiz Upload in Course Editor. All three features are working correctly.
passed_tests: Add Course card on Student Dashboard navigates to /student/courses when clicked
Add Course card has proper data-testid='add-course-card' attribute
Add Course card visible when student has enrollments but less than 5 courses
Preview button on Admin Admissions page opens modal dialog
Preview modal shows 'Applicant Information' section with Full Name, Email, Phone, Applied On date
Preview modal shows 'Applied Program' section with course name and application fee
Preview modal shows 'Uploaded Documents' section with High School Certificate and Identification fields
Upload Quiz button visible inside expanded module accordion in Course Editor
Upload Quiz dialog opens with 'Upload Quiz for [Module Name]' title
Download Template button present in Quiz Upload dialog
Upload Excel button present in Quiz Upload dialog
File input accepts .xlsx/.xls files for quiz upload
Save Quiz button shows count of loaded questions
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three features tested and working: 1) Add Course card (data-testid='add-course-card') in student Dashboard.jsx at line 227 wraps dashed card with Link to /student/courses, 2) Preview button (data-testid='preview-btn-{id}') in admin Admissions.jsx opens previewDialog showing applicant info, applied program, payment status, and uploaded documents, 3) Upload Quiz button in Course Editor opens dialog with Download Template and Upload Excel buttons using xlsx library for parsing.

add_course_navigation.description: Link wrapper around card-dashed element navigates to /student/courses

admission_preview_modal.description: Preview button opens Dialog with applicant details, program info, payment status, and document uploads

bulk_quiz_upload.description: Upload Quiz dialog with Download Template and Upload Excel functionality using xlsx library
